feed.title: UC OSPO Network
feed.subtitle: News and updates from the UC Open Source Program Office Network

entry.title: Introducing RepoWise: A Conversational AI Tool for OSS Repositories
entry.summary: RepoWise enables natural-language dialogue with Open-Source Software repositories, transforming how developers, maintainers, and researchers explore governance, contributions, and community health.

entry.title: Introducing OSSPREY: AI-Powered Forecasting and Actionable Insights for OSS Sustainability
entry.summary: OSSPREY delivers AI-powered sustainability forecasting and evidence-based recommendations to help maintainers keep projects healthy.

entry.title: The First Annual UC Open Highlights Open Source Innovation in the UC System
entry.summary: Celebrating Open Source and Open Science throughout the UC system

entry.title: UC OSPO Network Launches Open Source Survey
entry.summary: The UC OSPO Network is conducting a survey to understand the open source practices and needs of the University of California community.

entry.title: OSPOs in Higher Ed: A Love Data Week Recap
entry.summary: UC Love Data Week 2025 session highlights how OSPOs support open-source research and software sustainability across the UC system.

entry.title: Save the Date! UC Open 2025
entry.summary: Celebrating Open Source and Open Science throughout the UC system

entry.title: OSPO Network @ UC Tech
entry.summary: UC OSPO hosts two sessions at UC Tech 2024

entry.title: Charting a Course for Open Source Innovation
entry.summary: UC Berkeley Joins Multi-Campus Effort Supported by $1.85 Million Grant from Alfred P. Sloan Foundation to Advance Open Source Initiatives Across UC System.

entry.title: UC OSPO Network Launched
entry.summary: Sloan Foundation funds two-year pilot to create open source program offices throughout UC system
